relationships.context: Vrijen is the founder of Careerspan
Careerspan is built as a two-sided system with candidate and employer sides
The candidate side uses an AI-led conversational self-reflection flow
The employer side provides structured insight into candidate skills, gaps, and stories
Supports 50+ languages for fair evaluation of non-native English speakers
Core value proposition: deeper signal per candidate rather than more resumes
Alan is a founder who could benefit from Careerspan's value proposition
Alan's company needs a strong, reliable engineer as a complementary hire
The new engineer should complement the founding technical lead, not replace him
